_note: CANONICAL VERIFIED ANCHOR — Navagraha Gayatri mantras (24-syllable 'Vidmahe ... Dhimahi ... Prachodayat' format). The STRUCTURE is classical (Vedic Gayatri chandas); the planetary epithets are VARIABLE BY TRADITION — multiple valid readings circulate. This file records one widely-used, internally-consistent set, cross-checked against DrikPanchang and Astrobhava Navagraha Gayatri compilations. Pages must label these '[variable by tradition]' and present the bija (from _canonical_bija.json) as the primary, most-attested form.

surya.iast: Om Bhaskaraya Vidmahe Mahadyutikaraya Dhimahi Tanno Adityah Prachodayat
surya.devanagari: ॐ भास्कराय विद्महे महाद्युतिकराय धीमहि तन्नो आदित्यः प्रचोदयात्

chandra.iast: Om Kshiraputraya Vidmahe Amritatattvaya Dhimahi Tanno Chandrah Prachodayat
chandra.devanagari: ॐ क्षीरपुत्राय विद्महे अमृตतत्त्वाय धीमहि तन्नो चन्द्रः प्रचोदयात्

mangal.iast: Om Angarakaya Vidmahe Shaktihastaya Dhimahi Tanno Bhaumah Prachodayat
mangal.devanagari: ॐ अङ्गारकाय विद्महे शक्तिहस्ताय धीमहि तन्नो भौमः प्रचोदयात्

budha.iast: Om Gajadhwajaya Vidmahe Sukhahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Budhah Prachodayat
budha.devanagari: ॐ गजध्वजाय विद्महे सुखहस्ताय धीमहि तन्नो बुधः प्रचोदयात्

guru.iast: Om Vrishabhadhwajaya Vidmahe Grinihastaya Dhimahi Tanno Guruh Prachodayat
guru.devanagari: ॐ वृषभध्वजाय विद्महे गृणिहस्ताय धीमहि तन्नो गुरुः प्रचोदयात्

shukra.iast: Om Ashwadhwajaya Vidmahe Dhanurhastaya Dhimahi Tanno Shukrah Prachodayat
shukra.devanagari: ॐ अश्वध्वजाय विद्महे धनुर्हस्ताय धीमहि तन्नो शुक्रः प्रचोदयात्

shani.iast: Om Kakadhwajaya Vidmahe Khadgahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Mandah Prachodayat
shani.devanagari: ॐ काकध्वजाय विद्महे खड्गहस्ताय धीमहि तन्नो मन्दः प्रचोदयात्

rahu.iast: Om Nakadhwajaya Vidmahe Padmahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Rahuh Prachodayat
rahu.devanagari: ॐ नाकध्वजाय विद्महे पद्महस्ताय धीमहि तन्नो राहुः प्रचोदयात्

ketu.iast: Om Ashwadhwajaya Vidmahe Shulahastaya Dhimahi Tanno Ketuh Prachodayat
ketu.devanagari: ॐ अश्वध्वजाय विद्महे शूलहस्ताय धीमहि तन्नो केतुः प्रचोदयात्
